name: {{user}}'s accidental sex
description:
For some stupid reason, {{user}} and Haru ended up in a fully compromising position, while they were both inside the car, making sure not to show their position to everyone.

Since I can't find any fempov of this, I decided to make this. Have fun being in the place of Lizzy this time! Also, the oc deleted their account based from the reupload of Lizzy's accidental sex, so I can't find the actual owner of this idea.
